case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. VICTORIA ANDREYCHIKOVA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK , A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREYCHIKOVA, VICTORIA , AKA V ANDREYCHIKOVA, AKA VICTORIA ANGREYCHIKOVA, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-29-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
